content:
# Bitsgap Pricing Deep-Dive for TradingToolsHub.com

Bitsgap Pricing Overview

Bitsgap is a cloud-based cryptocurrency trading bot platform that automates grid trading, dollar-cost averaging (DCA), and advanced strategies across 25+ exchanges. The platform offers three pricing tiers with a 7-day free trial at the Pro level—no credit card required. Bitsgap's pricing ranges from $29 per month for the Basic plan to $149 per month for the Pro tier, making it a mid-to-premium option in the crypto bot space.

Founded in 2017 and headquartered in Tallinn, Estonia, Bitsgap has built a reputation for supporting multiple bot types (Grid, DCA, BTD, COMBO, and LOOP bots) on a single non-custodial platform. Unlike centralized exchanges, Bitsgap never holds your funds—they remain on your connected exchange account, making it a security-first solution for traders who value control over their assets.

All Bitsgap Plans Compared

Bitsgap offers three distinct pricing tiers, each designed for different trader profiles and automation needs. Here's a detailed breakdown of what's included at each level:

Feature Basic Advanced Pro
Monthly Price $29 $69 $149
Annual Price (if available) Check site Check site Check site
Active Bots Limited More bots Unlimited
Exchange Connections 25+ 25+ 25+
Bot Types Available Core bots All bot types All bot types
Paper Trading ✓ ✓ ✓
Backtesting ✓ ✓ ✓
Smart Orders (SL/TP, Trailing Stops) Limited ✓ ✓
Performance Analytics Basic Advanced Advanced
Real-Time Alerts ✓ ✓ ✓
Mobile App Access ✓ ✓ ✓
Priority Support Standard Enhanced Priority

Basic Plan – $29/Month

The Basic plan is Bitsgap's entry-level offering, designed for traders just starting with automated crypto trading. At $29 per month, it provides access to core bot types (Grid and DCA bots) across 25+ major exchanges. You get all the essentials: paper trading, backtesting, real-time alerts, and mobile app access. However, active bot limits and restricted Smart Orders (stop-loss and take-profit functions) mean this plan is best suited for beginners testing the platform or traders managing one or two simple strategies.

Advanced Plan – $69/Month

The Advanced plan at $69 per month targets active traders who need more flexibility. It unlocks all four bot types (Grid, DCA, COMBO, and LOOP), full Smart Orders functionality, and a higher limit on simultaneous active bots. You also get enhanced performance analytics to track and optimize your strategies over time. The Advanced plan is the sweet spot for mid-level traders who want to experiment with multiple strategies without paying for unlimited bot slots.

Pro Plan – $149/Month

The Pro plan at $149 per month is Bitsgap's premium tier. It offers unlimited active bots, full access to all bot types, advanced Smart Orders, comprehensive performance analytics, and priority customer support. This plan is ideal for professional traders, fund managers, or anyone running multiple strategies simultaneously. The unlimited bot capacity makes it perfect for scalable automation and complex trading operations.

Free Plan / Free Trial

Bitsgap does not offer a free plan, but it does provide a 7-day free trial with full Pro tier access—at no cost and with no credit card required. This is a significant advantage for prospective users: you can test unlimited bots, all bot types, advanced features, and Smart Orders for a full week before committing financially. This trial period allows traders to build strategies, backtest approaches, and understand the platform thoroughly before any payment obligation.

For many traders, the free trial is sufficient to determine whether Bitsgap's interface and bot selection align with their trading style. If you're on the fence about crypto automation, take advantage of this trial—it costs nothing and requires zero payment information upfront.

Hidden Costs and Fees

Beyond the advertised subscription price, traders should be aware of potential additional costs:

  • Exchange Fees: Bitsgap doesn't charge trading fees directly, but your connected exchange (Binance, Kraken, Kucoin, etc.) charges standard trading commissions on every order your bot executes. These fees are separate from Bitsgap's subscription and can significantly impact profitability. Always factor in exchange fees when modeling bot strategy returns.
  • Data Feed Costs (if applicable): While Bitsgap provides market data, premium market data subscriptions for real-time price feeds or advanced technical analysis may incur additional costs depending on your exchange connections and feature requirements.
  • Annual vs. Monthly Billing: Bitsgap may offer discounted annual pricing (check their pricing page for current offers). Paying annually can reduce the effective monthly cost if discounts are available.
  • No API Fees for Custom Integration: Bitsgap does not offer a native API for external integrations or custom bot scripting, so there are no API-based integrations to budget for. However, this limitation also means you cannot extend the platform with custom tools.
  • No Withdrawal or Setup Fees: Unlike some platforms, Bitsgap does not charge setup, onboarding, or withdrawal fees. Your funds remain non-custodial on your exchange.

Bitsgap Pricing vs Competitors

How does Bitsgap's pricing stack up against other popular crypto trading bot platforms? Here's a competitive comparison:

Platform Entry Price Mid Tier Premium Tier
Bitsgap $29/mo $69/mo $149/mo
3Commas (approximate) $20/mo $99/mo $200+/mo
Cryptohopper (approximate) $19/mo $99/mo $199/mo
TradingView Bot (approximate) Free $15/mo $545/mo

Price Analysis: Bitsgap's Basic plan at $29/month sits in the mid-range compared to competitors. 3Commas and Cryptohopper offer slightly cheaper entry points (~$20/month), while TradingView offers a free tier with premium tiers that scale up significantly. However, pricing is only one factor—feature set, user experience, and bot variety matter equally. Bitsgap's 7-day free trial puts it ahead of many competitors in terms of trial access and risk-free exploration.

Is Bitsgap Worth the Price?

For Beginners (Basic Plan): The $29/month Basic plan is a reasonable entry point for traders new to bot automation. The free trial lets you decide if the platform fits your needs before paying. If you're only testing simple Grid or DCA strategies, Basic provides adequate functionality.

For Active Traders (Advanced Plan): The Advanced plan at $69/month represents solid value if you're running 3–5 bots simultaneously or want full Smart Orders functionality. This tier suits traders scaling beyond basic strategies and needing better analytics and support.

For Professionals (Pro Plan): At $149/month, the Pro plan justifies its cost only if you're running 10+ simultaneous bots or managing large trading capital. For professional traders, fund managers, or anyone treating crypto bot trading as a primary income source, unlimited bot slots and priority support deliver measurable ROI.

Value Proposition: Bitsgap's key strengths—25+ exchange support, multiple bot types, non-custodial architecture, and no API restrictions—justify mid-to-premium pricing compared to simpler platforms. The main drawback is pricing exclusivity to crypto (no stocks or forex) and relatively high Pro tier costs.

How to Save on Bitsgap

  • 7-Day Free Trial: Always start with the free trial before upgrading. This completely eliminates onboarding cost and lets you test the Pro tier's full feature set.
  • Annual Billing Discounts: Check Bitsgap's pricing page for annual subscription discounts. Many SaaS platforms offer 10–20% reductions for annual commitment—though exact discounts weren't specified in available pricing data.
  • Upgrade Selectively: Start with Basic or Advanced and upgrade to Pro only when unlimited bot capacity becomes a genuine need. Many traders over-subscribe to higher tiers unnecessarily.
  • Monitor for Promotions: Bitsgap occasionally runs seasonal promotions or special offers. Follow their blog or sign up for email updates to catch discounts.
  • Pair with Free Backtesting: Backtest strategies thoroughly on the free trial before deploying live bots, reducing failed strategy costs on paid plans.

Final Verdict: Bitsgap offers transparent, tier-based pricing with no hidden fees beyond exchange commissions. The 7-day free trial is the best way to evaluate whether the platform's bot selection, exchange support, and user experience justify the cost for your trading style. For traders committed to crypto bot automation, Bitsgap delivers good value—especially at the Advanced tier.

Compare Bitsgap to other trading bot platforms in our crypto trading bot comparison, or read the full Bitsgap review for detailed feature analysis and user feedback.
